title: XOM as of 2026-02-13 (mechanical grid)
description: Mechanical grid case: corpus is exactly the 6 most recent SEC filings before 2026-02-13 via the EDGAR importer — no discretionary document picks, no narrative authored after the fact. Part of the fixed UNIVERSE x GRID_DATES sample built by backend/scripts/build_grid_cases.py.
description_zh: 机械网格案例：语料为基准日 2026-02-13 之前最近的 6 份 SEC 申报（EDGAR 导入，日期由监管方盖章），无任何人工挑选或事后撰写。由 build_grid_cases.py 按固定的股票池 × 日期网格生成。
